languages.text: "Пусть ксеносы истребляют ксеносов. Пусть меровцы избегают вмешиваться в их бои".
"Let the xenos annihilate the xenos. The Merovians can make sure to stay out of their battles."
languages.original_text: "Пусть ксеносы истребляют ксеносов. Пусть меровцы избегают вмешиваться в их бои".

traits.locale_text: "Let the xenos annihilate the xenos. The Merovians can make sure to stay out of their battles."
"Let the xenos annihilate the xenos. The Merovians can make sure to stay out of their battles."
"Let the xenos annihilate the xenos. The Merovians can make sure to stay out of their battles."

languages.text: 「異種族同士が滅し合うのを、メロヴィアンは戦いの外に留まるようにする」
languages.original_text: "Let the xenos annihilate the xenos. The Merovians can make sure to stay out of their battles."

traits.locale_text: 「異種族同士が滅し合うのを、メロヴィアンは戦いの外に留まるようにする」

languages.text: «Dejemos que los xenos se aniquilen entre ellos. Que los merovianos se mantengan al margen de sus batallas».
languages.original_text: "Let the xenos annihilate the xenos. The Merovians can make sure to stay out of their battles."

traits.locale_text: «Dejemos que los xenos se aniquilen entre ellos. Que los merovianos se mantengan al margen de sus batallas».

languages.text: “就让异形自相残杀吧。梅罗夫人只需远离它们的战场，不得卷入。”
languages.original_text: "Let the xenos annihilate the xenos. The Merovians can make sure to stay out of their battles."

traits.locale_text: “就让异形自相残杀吧。梅罗夫人只需远离它们的战场，不得卷入。”

languages.text: "Sollen sich die Xenos gegenseitig töten. Sagt den Merovianern, sie sollen sich nicht einmischen."
languages.original_text: "Let the xenos annihilate the xenos. The Merovians can make sure to stay out of their battles."

traits.locale_text: "Sollen sich die Xenos gegenseitig töten. Sagt den Merovianern, sie sollen sich nicht einmischen."

languages.text: "Bırakalım zenolar, zenoları yok etsin. Merovlular savaşın dışında kalsın."
languages.original_text: "Let the xenos annihilate the xenos. The Merovians can make sure to stay out of their battles."

traits.locale_text: "Bırakalım zenolar, zenoları yok etsin. Merovlular savaşın dışında kalsın."

languages.text: « Laissons les xénos s'entretuer. Les Meroviens s'assureront de ne pas se mêler à leurs affrontements. »
languages.original_text: "Let the xenos annihilate the xenos. The Merovians can make sure to stay out of their battles."

traits.locale_text: « Laissons les xénos s'entretuer. Les Meroviens s'assureront de ne pas se mêler à leurs affrontements. »
